page_content:
Prerequisite: ENES232 and ENAE311; or equivalents.

Jointly offered with: ENAE457.

Restriction: Must be in Engineering: Aerospace program; or permission of ENGR-Aerospace Engineering department; and must have senior or graduate standing.

Credit Only Granted for. ENAE457, ENAE457H, ENAE662.

ENAE663 Introduction to Plasmas for Space Propulsion and Power (3 Credits)

Characteristics of plasmas, motion of charged particles in fields, collisional processes, kinetic theory, fluid desctiption of plasmas, transpot properties, equilibrium vs. non-equilibrium, generation of plasmas.

Recommended: PHYS270 or equivalent.
